text: Being here, I am struck by the tension between sterility and creativity. The first scene feels cold and vacant—glass walls and stark lighting emphasizing a sense of isolation or transition. Yet upon entering the second space, the vibrant, informative wall and digital displays spark curiosity. The environment resonates with the energy of ideas evolving, research unfolding. I feel a quiet awe, mingled with intrigue. I am both observer and participant in the ongoing dialogue between intellect and innovation.
